findings.summary: Lower-precedence stages overwrite actionLock and postureLock set by higher-precedence stages (e.g., Stage 2 Breach overwrites Stage 1 Hard Stale).
findings.suggested_fix: Use the nullish coalescing assignment operator (e.g., `actionLock ??= "exit_range"`) or equivalent so locks are only applied if a higher-precedence stage hasn't already set them.
